paragraph: Stock your paper supplies with this wide ruled filler paper. The sturdy construction is ideal for everyday use, and each sheet is three-hole punched to fit into standard binders. This Staples Business Essentials 8 x 10.5-inch wide ruled filler paper comes with 120 sheets per pack, ensuring you have paper ready to use at appointments, class and other important meetings.
bullets: Wide ruled filler paper is a perfect choice for all your note-taking needs
headliner: Take notes, draw pictures and write essays with this 120-pack of Staples Business Essentials 8 x 10.5-inch wide ruled filler paper.

paragraph: Write important information to remember in this college-ruled assorted-color composition book. The college-ruled spacing lets you fit more words on each page, while the assorted colors make this notebook ideal for a color-coded system. This Staples 7.5 x 9.75-inch assorted-color composition book has 80 sheets, so there's plenty of room for all your notes, while the standard size offers easy organization.
bullets: Composition notebook is great for permanent note-taking in class or at home
100 sheets of college-ruled paper for efficient use of space
Casebound construction is strong and durable

headliner: Protect notes from the wear of regular use with this Staples 7.5 x 9.75-inch assorted-color composition notebook.

imageAltTexts: Texas Instruments TI-84 Plus CE 10-Digit Graphing Calculator, Black~#|#~2F0F72D8-12E4-41CA-819677F026C95B4F_sc7
dummyKey.title: Texas Instruments TI-84 Plus CE 10-Digit Graphing Calculator, Black

paragraph: Equip students for success in STEM classes with this graphing calculator. The high-resolution backlit color display delivers bright, clear views of graphs, equations, and other figures, and the color-coding options let you distinguish between plots and points with better accuracy. Pre-loaded apps and images offer added assistance with a range of problems. This calculator boasts clearly labeled function keys and an alphabetical on-screen catalog of all available operations, so you can quickly find the right choice for your work. The ultra-thin design fits neatly in a backpack or pocket. Approved for use on PSAT, SAT, and ACT exams, this Texas Instruments TI-84 Plus CE calculator is a perfect tool for students.
bullets: Non-CAS graphing calculator with 10-digit color display - lightweight, yet durable enough to withstand the demands of the classroom year after year
Graph in vibrant colors to make faster, stronger connections
Powered by a TI Rechargeable Battery that can last up to one month on a single charge
Distraction-free (no Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, internet access) to keep students focused on learning
Code on the go — students can code anytime, anywhere with the power of portable programming
Ideal for students to use in any learning environment, virtual or in person
Display expressions, symbols and fractions just as you write them
3000KB of ROM memory and 154KB of RAM memory capacity to tackle complex computing

Applications: Cabri Jr., CellSheet, Conics, Inequality Graphing, Language Localizer, Periodic Table, Polynomial Root Finder/Simultaneous Equation Solver, Probability Simulation, Science Tools, TI TestGuard, Transformation Graphing, and Vernier EasyData
headliner: Perform advanced math functions effortlessly with this Texas Instruments TI-84 Plus CE graphing calculator.
expandedDescr:
The same menu structure and navigation as the TI-84 Plus family make it easy to pick up and learn. Built-in MathPrint™ functionality allows you to input and view math symbols, formulas and stacked fractions exactly as they appear in textbooks. USB port for computer connectivity, unit-to-unit communication with TI-84 Plus, TI-84 Plus Silver Edition, TI-84 Plus C Silver Edition, and other TI-84 Plus CE graphing calculators.

Compatible Applications: Cabri™ Jr, CellSheet™, Conics, Inequality Graphing, Language Localizers, Periodic Table, Polynomial Root Finder/Simultaneous Equation Solver, Probability Simulation, Science Tools, TI TestGuard™, Transformation Graphing, Vernier EasyData®.
